pre_config:
show config interfaces ge400-0/0/34 urpf | no-more

# NCP3-nog config-start [19-Apr-2026 22:10:28 UTC]

interfaces
  ge400-0/0/34
    urpf
      admin-state enabled
      allow-default disabled
      mode strict
      address-family ipv4
        admin-state enabled
        allow-default disabled
        mode strict
      !
      address-family ipv6
        admin-state enabled
        allow-default disabled
        mode strict
      !
    !
  !
!

# NCP3-nog config-end

NCP3-nog#
